summary: Luxyle project — web presence with a featured collection section and an About Luxyle page. User is ordering/reordering page sections.

existing_features.title: On the Home page, reorder the sections so that the FeaturedCollections component appears before the AboutSection component. The new order should be: Hero, Stats bar, FeaturedCollections, About, CollectionGallery, Reviews, FeedbackForm, AppointmentBooking.
